decision.summary: No existing management is needed and there is no valid new price-hit or floor entry.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor transcript and recent summaries still keep the thesis bearish below 75k-76k, with 73.5k-74k treated as resistance and further downside toward 70k and possibly 67k-66k still favored. Binance does not confirm fresh downside execution right now: BTC is 72135.11, up 1.439% on the day and trading close to the 24h high, so bearish momentum confirmation is weak. The nearest bearish price-hit candidates are too discounted for a clean edge (70k daily at 7.0%, 68k weekly at 29.0%), while bullish price-hit markets like 73k daily at 36.5% or 74k weekly at 63.5% conflict with Beecthor’s active thesis. The floor market above 72k at 56.5% also fails because the thesis still implies BTC can break back below 72k.
